faqs.question: How is the infrastructure at Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya?
faqs.answer: Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya provide good facilities all around the campus such as Auditorium, Cafeteria, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Library.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya?
faqs.answer: Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya offers Degree courses including 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has Advanced Masters, Post Doctorate courses. description: Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya cutoff 2025 will be available soon. For MD and MS courses, the NEET PG exam is considered for the admission process. The NEET PG cutoff is released as opening and closing ranks for different categories in the AI and HS quotas. A few more updates are below:
The 3rd round of seat allotment for Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD programme for various categories under the All India quota.
For the General AI category, closing rank is 2876, with MD in Paediatrics being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD course. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Paediatrics, with a round 3 closing rank of 2876 for the General AI category.
Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for different categories, quotas and rounds.

NEET PG Counselling 2024 has been released for different categories of students. The special stray vacancy round result was the last round for NEET PG counselling. Candidates, who appeared in the counselling process can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET PG cutoff lists.

Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff was 4162, with M.Ch. being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Chacha Nehru Bal Chikitsalaya M.Ch. cutoff 2025 was 4162 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 4162, M.Ch. in Paediatric Surgery turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Candidates can use the provided filters to learn more about the NEET SS cutoff across different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at St. Peter's Medical College, Hospital and Research Institute?
faqs.answer: St. Peter's Medical College, Hospital and Research Institute offers Degree and Diploma courses including 3 UG course. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. St. Peter's Medical College, Hospital and Research Institute has specializations such as GNM specializations in General Nursing & Midwifery.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best place to study not a good place to enjoy.

review_content.Placements: There were about 150 students in each batch. However, the internship stipend is not known as our seniors did not enter into it, and they are in their final year. And in MBBS, we don't have any placements, it's about taking PG seats by writing NEET PG exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice and big, there is no Wi-Fi, and the classroom is larger and airier. Coming to the hostel, there are 2 members per room with an attached bathroom. The room is sufficient for 2 people. We do have a canteen, which has stationery items in it. We have 3 playgrounds for football, basketball, and volleyball. Our college is equipped with nice medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best study, not more student-friendly.

review_content.Placements: Mostly passed-out students hold only MBBS UG degrees, so they can get junior positions in any hospital or even work at their own hospital. This is a medical college, so no companies come to recruit students. Students mainly focus on studying for NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is provided. Student outings are not allowed, and students are asked to stay in the hostel permanently. The hostel food is average. Online food delivery apps are not permitted inside the campus for safety reasons. There is a time restriction on weekdays, with a cutoff at 7 pm.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: We are very satisfied with our education system's good placement in 2023 .

content.Placements: Our college doesn't have much experience, as it was started a few years ago. Only one batch has passed out from our college. Most of the students have jobs in various hospitals. Our own hospital also provides placement for students. The fee structure starts at 6 lacs for 4 years, with additional fees like exam fees, transportation fees, etc. being excluded .
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a multi-specialty hospital with all departments and also has every modern facilities available. Our college also have every labs which is required for our students to complete their requirements per year. Food and water are hygienic, but most of the students may not like the taste of the food as it is made differently here. We may or may not like the taste of the food. It's better to keep up with the food available here .

outlook.description:
St. Peter's Medical College, Hospital and Research Institute has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Physiotherapy' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for St. Peter's Medical College, Hospital and Research Institute indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Physiotherapy' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, St. Peter's Medical College, Hospital and Research Institute's rank is #16, the same as last year's rank in the 'Physiotherapy' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

college_info.college_name: Columbia Institute of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Columbia Institute of Pharmacy Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Columbia Institute of Pharmacy goes up to 220. Courses offerred by Columbia Institute of Pharmacy are approved by eminent Government bodies such as PCI.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Columbia Institute of Pharmacy for all courses together?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Columbia Institute of Pharmacy offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Pharma and D.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Pharma. The Columbia Institute of Pharmacy course fee ranges between INR 1,02,000 to 2,61,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Good for studies. Dissatisfied with sports, infrastructure, events etc.

review_content.Placements: No top companies are coming for campus but local companies offer basic package of 1.5-2.5 LPA. No top roles are offered here beside working in factory., personally I'm disappointed with that. If you have any family business, you can go for it otherwise no.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is good it have so many books including all sets of pharmacopoeia. Canteen is not great to be honest. Building is good and not that great. No sports period or sports happen in college, only 1 week a year it happens. No events are organized till date. We usually get bored in class due to one female teacher .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for the pharmacy course.

review_content.Placements: The Bachelor of Pharmacy course offered by the college is pretty good and impressive. Almost all the students get placed from the college with roles like quality control, quality assurance and production. Top industries like Sun Pharmaceutical, Alkem, La Renon, etc., visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has excellent labs for all the practical work. All the essential equipment are available for the practical. There are also machines like a serve shaker, tablet punching machine and calibration apparatus. It has a separate UV chamber for the microbiology practicals, and UV Spectrophotometer is also available. Overall, it is well versed in everything. Hostel facilities are good and hygienic. The food served in the canteen is average, but not so good.

review_summary.college_name: Columbia Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good for studies. Dissatisfied with sports, infrastructure, events etc.

content.Placements: No top companies are coming for campus but local companies offer basic package of 1.5-2.5 LPA. No top roles are offered here beside working in factory., personally I'm disappointed with that. If you have any family business, you can go for it otherwise no.
content.Infrastructure: Library is good it have so many books including all sets of pharmacopoeia. Canteen is not great to be honest. Building is good and not that great. No sports period or sports happen in college, only 1 week a year it happens. No events are organized till date. We usually get bored in class due to one female teacher .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for the pharmacy course.

content.Placements: The Bachelor of Pharmacy course offered by the college is pretty good and impressive. Almost all the students get placed from the college with roles like quality control, quality assurance and production. Top industries like Sun Pharmaceutical, Alkem, La Renon, etc., visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: It has excellent labs for all the practical work. All the essential equipment are available for the practical. There are also machines like a serve shaker, tablet punching machine and calibration apparatus. It has a separate UV chamber for the microbiology practicals, and UV Spectrophotometer is also available. Overall, it is well versed in everything. Hostel facilities are good and hygienic. The food served in the canteen is average, but not so good.

content.Infrastructure: So, we're talking about its infrastructure; it's all good, and you will not be disappointed. But the canteen is charging extra for any items, and the items cooked there are not so worthy. Classrooms are clean, and in washrooms, there is a little bit of smell. You can manage it.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides very good facilities. Students who study here have a brilliant future.

review_content.Placements: Above 60% of the students from our course got placed in very good positions. Intelligent students can build their careers in a very brilliant way. The highest salary package offered in our course is above 5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is above Rs. 80,000 per annum. The average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top roles offered are CA, HR manager, and CEO.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the campus are very good. The campus provides all the required facilities to students. The infrastructure of the labs, classrooms, and library is very good. Students can study in the library. They can issue books from the library to study. College also organises some sports functions for the betterment of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Computer, Statistics, Maths) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I really appreciate all the things I learned in college. I learned so much from my college.

review_content.Placements: It seems like 90% of students were placed in my college. The highest package is INR 3 lacs or above, the lowest is INR 1 lac, and the average is INR 1.5–2 lacs. Minimum 60% of students get internships, and the top roles are statistical investigator and coding trainer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good. We are so comfortable when we attend a class, and in computer labs, each and every computer works perfectly. In hostels, the food is not so good but not so bad. I am a local, so I didn't join the hostel, but my colleagues tell me it is comfortable living in hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good facilities and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible for placements after three years. Top recruiters are Infosys, Mohindra, Dell, and many other companies. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Around 60% of students get placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure. It has 2 libraries,  3 playgrounds, a huge number of rooms, separate washrooms for girls and boys, and separate canteens for boys and girls with good and fresh food. Hostel facilities are available for girls. It has 3 computer labs. Books and journals are available in libraries.

overview_faqs.question: Is Government Mohindra College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Government Mohindra College is a distinguished institution offering M.A, M.Com, M.Sc, PG Diploma, BBA, B.A, B.Com, B.J.M.C, B.Sc, BCA, B.A. LL.B. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Science, Beauty & Fitness, Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, Medicine & Health Sciences, IT & Software, Law field. Government Mohindra College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Government Mohindra College has received an impressive review rating of 3.83 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 4.34 for Campus Life, 3.26 for Placements, 3.63 for Faculty, and 4.18 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Government Mohindra College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Computer, Statistics, Maths) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty members, supportive environment, and excellent placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Placement department was highly active and supportive. They organised regular training sessions, mock interviews and invited top recruiters from various industries. Thanks to their efforts a large number of students secured jobs before graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Campus environment was vibrant, welcoming with plenty of opportunities for students to get involved in extracurricular activities and students clubs. College offered a wide range of resources, from modern labs to career counselling. I had grown so much as a person.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I recommend everyone to please visit and get admission.

content.Placements: In our batch at Government Mohindra College, the majority pursued BCA, and around 60% were placed. The highest diploma and around 80% received scholarships.
content.Infrastructure: All services are available in emergencies, including doctors, police, and other support. Caretakers are also available to assist girls if they face any problems. The girls’ hostel is very clean, and the boys’ hostel is also well-maintained. I initially thought there might be some issues in the boys’ hostel because of some locals, but no, the hostel is very nice.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It provides very good facilities. Students who study here have a brilliant future.

content.Placements: Above 60% of the students from our course got placed in very good positions. Intelligent students can build their careers in a very brilliant way. The highest salary package offered in our course is above 5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is above Rs. 80,000 per annum. The average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top roles offered are CA, HR manager, and CEO.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by the campus are very good. The campus provides all the required facilities to students. The infrastructure of the labs, classrooms, and library is very good. Students can study in the library. They can issue books from the library to study. College also organises some sports functions for the betterment of the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Computer, Statistics, Maths) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I really appreciate all the things I learned in college. I learned so much from my college.

content.Placements: It seems like 90% of students were placed in my college. The highest package is INR 3 lacs or above, the lowest is INR 1 lac, and the average is INR 1.5–2 lacs. Minimum 60% of students get internships, and the top roles are statistical investigator and coding trainer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good. We are so comfortable when we attend a class, and in computer labs, each and every computer works perfectly. In hostels, the food is not so good but not so bad. I am a local, so I didn't join the hostel, but my colleagues tell me it is comfortable living in hostels.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good facilities and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for placements after three years. Top recruiters are Infosys, Mohindra, Dell, and many other companies. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Around 60% of students get placements.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure. It has 2 libraries,  3 playgrounds, a huge number of rooms, separate washrooms for girls and boys, and separate canteens for boys and girls with good and fresh food. Hostel facilities are available for girls. It has 3 computer labs. Books and journals are available in libraries.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend everyone to please visit and get admission.
reviews.review_text: All services are available in emergencies, including doctors, police, and other support. Caretakers are also available to assist girls if they face any problems. The girls’ hostel is very clean, and the boys’ hostel is also well-maintained. I initially thought there might be some issues in the boys’ hostel because of some locals, but no, the hostel is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: It provides very good facilities. Students who study here have a brilliant future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the campus are very good. The campus provides all the required facilities to students. The infrastructure of the labs, classrooms, and library is very good. Students can study in the library. They can issue books from the library to study. College also organises some sports functions for the betterment of the students.

reviews.review_heading: I really appreciate all the things I learned in college. I learned so much from my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. We are so comfortable when we attend a class, and in computer labs, each and every computer works perfectly. In hostels, the food is not so good but not so bad. I am a local, so I didn't join the hostel, but my colleagues tell me it is comfortable living in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good facilities and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure. It has 2 libraries,  3 playgrounds, a huge number of rooms, separate washrooms for girls and boys, and separate canteens for boys and girls with good and fresh food. Hostel facilities are available for girls. It has 3 computer labs.  Books and journals are available in libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Is, mohindra school good, are teacher's friendly.
reviews.review_text: It was great experience. It got Wi-Fi on every floor. And classroom were good. The experience was great. I can say facilities were good but food and sports were the best part.

reviews.review_heading: College Infrastructure is not so good.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in our college and other facilities are the worst here there are 3 computer labs in our college but all are average. There is no facility of hostel for boys and drinking water is better in every department as well as an attached toilet with every department.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Mohindra College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Our college provides Wi-Fi every day, but it is only 30 Mb. That is useful for a student. Our college has a well-equipped library that's very quiet. Our college doesn't have any mess or canteen, so students have to go to outside cafes. Our college has three computer labs that are just average.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the oldest colleges in North India.
reviews.review_text: In our college, very good infrastructure is available with air-conditioning rooms and Wi-Fi. The library is good with lots of books related to Punjab heritage. The hostel is available only for girls. Good food is available in the canteen. A lot of sports activities are available like football, basketball, and baseball.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Patiala and the fee structure is reasonable.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi data every day which is not enough at all it is only near about 30 MB for Jio using students. Students have 2-3 computer laboratories which are very neat and all the accessories and computers are working. The hostel is not available for boys, and it is only for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with everything.
reviews.review_text: Our department is too small. Classrooms are not adequately provided. Most of the time we search rooms for lectures. Condition of washrooms and water coolers are even worst. Hostel facilities are average but some of regulations are inappropriate. Canteen is closed. We have to go out of college for refreshments. No spare time is provided for lunch.

reviews.review_heading: Our college understand the value of studies and gives freedom.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not so good but the lab is very good. Classrooms and labs are perfect. Hostel rooms and mess are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are amazing. The classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. I feel very lucky to be a part of this college. There are separate canteens for both boys and girls, and the quality of food is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in the city. The course fee is good considering the infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped laboratories. Our college provides air-conditioned computer laboratories. It has a huge library containing extremely good quality books. There is no need to buy books for a semester as all books are available in the library, and online books are also available. The college has hygienic bathrooms on every floor for both boys and girls. The college has a free Wi-Fi facility inside the campus. The college has different clubs according to one's interest.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you to make your decision wisely.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. Our college is also popular because a lot of movies and Punjabi songs are shooted like Nikka Zaildar, Black song and many more. So, it's fun here, but sometimes it is bad also. However, overall, the campus is good.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with my college because of its location.

review_content.Placements: Each batch has 100 students, and the course consists of 5.5 years. There is no placement year in this course and no roles companies for placement packages. There is an internship in the last year of the course, and it is mandatory for all students to get into it.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no doubt that the college facilities are almost average, and the infrastructure available is also basic. There are more facilities and standard infrastructure in any normal primary and secondary school. Till now, there is no completed hostel, and the quality of food is also below average. There is no ground for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty is very good. The location might be an issue for AIQ, but it resolves with time.

review_content.Placements: An MBBS degree offers quite a promising job. None of the batch has passed out from our college yet, because this college started in 2022, and the MBBS takes 5.5 years to complete.
review_content.Infrastructure: As the pioneer batch, the academic campus is still in progress. Most probably, it will be fully functional by 2026. Our hostel is very well furnished, and the lecture theatres are also very well designed. This can be a perk of a newly built college. We do have a library over here which provides almost all medical books.
review_content.Faculty: Here, faculty members are very helpful and try their best to pass your exams. Also, they are very experienced. Each department has very good faculty members, and their number is increasing over time. They help us in every possible way to excel in studies. The exam can be an issue because it is conducted by WBUHS. The issue with this university is that it makes very unpredictable papers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and staff but no college and campus life .

review_content.Placements: There are no so-called packages in MBBS but the starting salary after completing the course is around 50,000–60,000. After the study, one can become a medical officer in a government hospital. An internship is provided by the college to all the students for which they get stipend and it is compulsory .
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not up to par, as we still don't have our college campus after 2 years. Classes and labs are being arranged in the hospital building. The hostel is good, with spacious rooms having windows for good ventilation. Beds with mattresses are provided. A table, chair and almirah are also given. Sports and games facilities are nil because there is no space on the hospital campus. The medical facilities are good, as it is a well-established hospital. Mess and canteen food is pathetic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely stasfied by the college .

review_content.Placements: Students are so intelligent here and same with the teacher I think there are above 60%of students that got internship from there courses and in top companies top roles are offferd in every course the number of students were placed in our course is app 80%.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi facilities everywhere every hostel you choose is good library is also so peaceful and good student are so comparatively labs are outstanding the quality of food in our hostel is top notch if feels like home also in canteen food is good and tasty .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied from this college

review_content.Placements: This is gov medical college which located in howrah district. Academically this is one of good college, here during internship 28k stipened is given after that you may goes to govt sector or private sect where you will earn from 65k to 1lakh which may vary according to experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Since this is new college so infra is very good but it will take 1 year more for full complete. Library is fully air condition. Mess and canteen are good enough, ground for sports are available.Air conditioning lab are for each subject. 4 lecture theatre are here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overwhelmed very satisfied with this college it is the best college I have .

review_content.Placements: About 60% students were enrolles in MBBS course for 4 years. Everyone knows that studying in medical course is not easy job but when u join this college u will feel like studying n learning things like babies things We welcome u in this college do come.
review_content.Infrastructure: Best in all every infrastructure of this campus is op level. U can enjoy every corner of building. Like u can join national cadet corps (ncc) scout guide. You can be selected for tours and game activities moreover u can get valid Certificate in your activities.

comparison_colleges.college: Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay Govt. Medical College and Hospital

review_summary.college_name: Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay Govt. Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with my college because of its location.

content.Placements: Each batch has 100 students, and the course consists of 5.5 years. There is no placement year in this course and no roles companies for placement packages. There is an internship in the last year of the course, and it is mandatory for all students to get into it.
content.Infrastructure: There is no doubt that the college facilities are almost average, and the infrastructure available is also basic. There are more facilities and standard infrastructure in any normal primary and secondary school. Till now, there is no completed hostel, and the quality of food is also below average. There is no ground for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is very good. The location might be an issue for AIQ, but it resolves with time.

content.Placements: An MBBS degree offers quite a promising job. None of the batch has passed out from our college yet, because this college started in 2022, and the MBBS takes 5.5 years to complete.
content.Infrastructure: As the pioneer batch, the academic campus is still in progress. Most probably, it will be fully functional by 2026. Our hostel is very well furnished, and the lecture theatres are also very well designed. This can be a perk of a newly built college. We do have a library over here which provides almost all medical books.
content.Faculty: Here, faculty members are very helpful and try their best to pass your exams. Also, they are very experienced. Each department has very good faculty members, and their number is increasing over time. They help us in every possible way to excel in studies. The exam can be an issue because it is conducted by WBUHS. The issue with this university is that it makes very unpredictable papers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and staff but no college and campus life .

content.Placements: There are no so-called packages in MBBS but the starting salary after completing the course is around 50,000–60,000. After the study, one can become a medical officer in a government hospital. An internship is provided by the college to all the students for which they get stipend and it is compulsory .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not up to par, as we still don't have our college campus after 2 years. Classes and labs are being arranged in the hospital building. The hostel is good, with spacious rooms having windows for good ventilation. Beds with mattresses are provided. A table, chair and almirah are also given. Sports and games facilities are nil because there is no space on the hospital campus. The medical facilities are good, as it is a well-established hospital. Mess and canteen food is pathetic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely stasfied by the college .

content.Placements: Students are so intelligent here and same with the teacher I think there are above 60%of students that got internship from there courses and in top companies top roles are offferd in every course the number of students were placed in our course is app 80%.
content.Infrastructure: There are Wi-Fi facilities everywhere every hostel you choose is good library is also so peaceful and good student are so comparatively labs are outstanding the quality of food in our hostel is top notch if feels like home also in canteen food is good and tasty .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied from this college

content.Placements: This is gov medical college which located in howrah district. Academically this is one of good college, here during internship 28k stipened is given after that you may goes to govt sector or private sect where you will earn from 65k to 1lakh which may vary according to experience.
content.Infrastructure: Since this is new college so infra is very good but it will take 1 year more for full complete. Library is fully air condition. Mess and canteen are good enough, ground for sports are available.Air conditioning lab are for each subject. 4 lecture theatre are here.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you are serious about becoming a good doctor, this place gives you a platform.

review_content.Placements: Even though we're the first batch and placements are still a few years away, the academic setup and clinical training look like they’re on the right track. With proper guidance and self-preparation, we’ll be in a good position by the time we pass out in 2028.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture halls are spacious, air-conditioned, and equipped with smart boards. Labs are well stocked with the latest equipment. The library is quiet and well organised, containing a large number of books to read and gain knowledge. Wi-Fi is available inside the classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Review of GMCN. It's gonna give memories.

review_content.Placements: It's difficult to be a doctor. We need a lot of patience and we learn a lot of life lessons from this. From the second year, we have postings in our respective wards. We need to learn and deal with patients' emotions. There are moments when we feel like giving up, but then the sparkler moment happens which reminds that the role of doctors is very needed.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a separate study room equipped with cots, beds, and an almirah. We have centralized air-conditioners in classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied and happy to be a part of this college.

review_content.Placements: There are 400 students in 4 batches. The highest package is Rs.35,000 per month. Out of 100, around 70 students get their internships along with full-scale exposure, skill development, intermittent training, community exposure, handling large campaigns, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has distinct classrooms for every batch, along with labs, demonstration rooms, seminar rooms, college and hostel Wi-Fi, and a big library with a huge collection of books. The hostel facilities include 24-hour running water and electricity. The food quality in the mess is decent and pretty normal. The canteen is also cheap for students. Medical facilities include free treatment for students. We have four playgrounds for various sports like cricket, football, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and peaceful campus experience.

review_content.Placements: Actually, it is a new college, and not a single batch has passed out from it. The first batch will pass out in 2025. Then I will be able to tell if the placement is good or not. But the overall experience says the students will definitely get placements as doctors are few in our country.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and aesthetics are really good and pleasing. If you love recording, then it is really very beautiful. The environment is really pleasing, not full of crowds and noise. You will get a peaceful environment where you will feel like you are at home. The natural feel makes you feel fresh.

The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 25402 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Lakhimpur Medical College and Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 25402 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27078 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and happy to be a part of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has distinct classrooms for every batch, along with labs, demonstration rooms, seminar rooms, college and hostel Wi-Fi, and a big library with a huge collection of books. The hostel facilities include 24-hour running water and electricity. The food quality in the mess is decent and pretty normal. The canteen is also cheap for students. Medical facilities include free treatment for students. We have four playgrounds for various sports like cricket, football, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and peaceful campus experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and aesthetics are really good and pleasing. If you love recording, then it is really very beautiful. The environment is really pleasing, not full of crowds and noise. You will get a peaceful environment where you will feel like you are at home. The natural feel makes you feel fresh.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college and it provides the best memories.

review_content.Placements: COVAS, Udgir has one of the best placements through GVK EMRI which is public-private partnership basis. Students get placed in different pharmaceutical companies like Alembic and Intas. It has diverse branch placements including the poultry industry like Venky. Professors have good connections in the Dairy industry like Gokul Kolhapur, Amul Gujarat, and Rajhans Sangamner. Students can get a package that ranges from 6-10 LPA in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: COVAS, Udgir has the best infrastructure. It has a specialised clinic with various resources like the department of surgery, medicine, and gynecology. There is a special department for para-clinical subjects having an electronic microscope. The hostel is good with awesome surroundings.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A balanced review of Mumbai Veterinary College.

review_content.Placements: No companies come to the college for placements. Most students opt for a master's or civil services. Others work in clinics. Others opt for vet-based companies. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. It varies widely. Civil service is the best bet for students. Many work in dairy or animal product companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost morbid on the Goregoan Campus. The building is on the verge of collapse. The Parcel Campus is 100 years old and is a site of heritage. UG classes are held at Goregoan. Currently, a new building is being constructed at Goregoan Campus. The hostel for girls is well-maintained, albeit a little cramped.

review_summary.college_name: Maharashtra Animal and Fishery Sciences University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: More than just a degree - (covas parbhani) experience.

content.Placements: There is a batch of 85 students. The highest package is above 50 LPA. All private companies related to veterinary hire us. We have top government jobs, classes, and one officer like LDO (livestock department officer). We have much scope in this field, it's one of the best medical field types.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is full of greenery and trees, creating a peaceful environment. We have modern e-classrooms, and 3-floor library with all required books. We have separate hostel facilities with a garden, indoor sports rooms, and large playgrounds for cricket, volleyball, football, and more.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You will never regret here after joining.

content.Placements: There are around more than 80 seats for BVSC at NVC Nagpur. All are filled on the basis of NEET marks only. No private colleges and only 6 government colleges in Maharashtra for BVSC hence competition is very low in this field. After completing a degree you can for government jobs including class A officer jobs like L.D.O, V.O, Army (R.V.C), in railway sector, banks, business (poultry/dairy), research, etc. There is a separate placement cell in Mafsu. On average Rs 40,000 per month is minimum and for the highest sky is the limit.
content.Infrastructure: There are good working labs, library too with sufficient books, canteen has hygienic, tasty food. College supports every good extra talent you inert particularly for sports. Cricket, basketball, and badminton are the main games here. Some department labs are somewhat old, there is some more scope for improvement.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college and it provides the best memories.

content.Placements: COVAS, Udgir has one of the best placements through GVK EMRI which is public-private partnership basis. Students get placed in different pharmaceutical companies like Alembic and Intas. It has diverse branch placements including the poultry industry like Venky. Professors have good connections in the Dairy industry like Gokul Kolhapur, Amul Gujarat, and Rajhans Sangamner. Students can get a package that ranges from 6-10 LPA in the final year.
content.Infrastructure: COVAS, Udgir has the best infrastructure. It has a specialised clinic with various resources like the department of surgery, medicine, and gynecology. There is a special department for para-clinical subjects having an electronic microscope. The hostel is good with awesome surroundings.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A balanced review of Mumbai Veterinary College.

content.Placements: No companies come to the college for placements. Most students opt for a master's or civil services. Others work in clinics. Others opt for vet-based companies. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. It varies widely. Civil service is the best bet for students. Many work in dairy or animal product companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost morbid on the Goregoan Campus. The building is on the verge of collapse. The Parcel Campus is 100 years old and is a site of heritage. UG classes are held at Goregoan. Currently, a new building is being constructed at Goregoan Campus. The hostel for girls is well-maintained, albeit a little cramped.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College infrastructure is average, but faculties and labs are the best; best placement in government

content.Placements: Veterinary doctor doesn't need to work under someone; he is like the owner of the whole company. There are plenty of private as well as gov jobs which we can apply for. Government jobs: there is a post of livestock development officer for which we need to pass MPSC. There are private jobs like we can work in Vantara and other private firms. They get salaries in 6 digits. Companies like Vantara, saguna foods etc. All students need to do an internship; it is compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: This college ranks in the top 5 in Maharashtra and has exemplary records. This college has the greatest infrastructure, well-organised labs, pathology, and physiology labs. The anatomy lab is quite much bigger and better than other colleges. The college hostel is the best to live in, clean, and has very best facilities. There is cleanliness in the campus as well as sports facilities. There is a ground for playing sports. I didn't think the college had any bad aspects. The faculty is of top class, and all faculty members are very much experienced.

reviews.review_heading: More than just a degree - (covas parbhani) experience.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is full of greenery and trees, creating a peaceful environment. We have modern e-classrooms, and 3-floor library with all required books. We have separate hostel facilities with a garden, indoor sports rooms, and large playgrounds for cricket, volleyball, football, and more.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 2 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: You will never regret here after joining.
reviews.review_text: There are good working labs, library too with sufficient books, canteen has hygienic, tasty food. College supports every good extra talent you inert particularly for sports. Cricket, basketball, and badminton are the main games here. Some department labs are somewhat old, there is some more scope for improvement.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, UdgirReviewed on 26 Mar 2025)

There is a special department for para-clinical subjects having an electronic microscope. The hostel is good with awesome surroundings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Bombay Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 11 Jan 2025)

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is almost morbid on the Goregoan Campus. The building is on the verge of collapse. The Parcel Campus is 100 years old and is a site of heritage. UG classes are held at Goregoan. Currently, a new building is being constructed at Goregoan Campus. The hostel for girls is well-maintained, albeit a little cramped.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 25 Nov 2024)

The anatomy lab is quite much bigger and better than other colleges. The college hostel is the best to live in, clean, and has very best facilities. There is cleanliness in the campus as well as sports facilities. There is a ground for playing sports. I didn't think the college had any bad aspects. The faculty is of top class...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 20 Sep 2024)

High teach classrooms with projectors and well maintained hygiene is provided. Hostels are very affordable and good mess food is there. Healthy and tasty food is provided and sports equipments are also there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Nagpur Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 26 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.

Mess is available. Hostel is perfect. The food quality is decent. Every week, doctors visit our hostel. We also have a gym facility in th...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. Our college has the best library. It has many books. Our college has digital classrooms. They are good. Laboratories are good. They have all the required instruments. All instruments are good. Our college provides a hostel facility for girls and boys.

The digital classroom is there with Wi-Fi and expert teachers.

The hostel facilities were good.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, VIPER - Vishnu Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research ranks #87 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for VIPER - Vishnu Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: In our college, many students are placed. Top recruiting companies like Dr. Reddy's, Aurobindo, Piramal Health Care, MSN Laboratories, etc., visit our campus. Internships are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. Each department has its own specified lab with all the latest equipment and instruments. review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and experienced. Our college is affiliated with JNTUH, so all exams are conducted by them. It helps students in developing their skills. Our teachers support the students in participating in various activities, like attending conferences at other colleges, publishing articles, and writing research articles.

review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good lab equipment and a digital classroom with projectors. The college has a library with different kinds of books online and offline. content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. content.Infrastructure: Labs have all the requirements which are needed for the procedures we do in labs. There are required machines for procedures and also for representation of standard operating procedures. Our college provides good Wi-Fi, library and hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: In our college, many students are placed. Top recruiting companies like Dr. Reddy's, Aurobindo, Piramal Health Care, MSN Laboratories, etc., visit our campus. Internships are available.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. Each department has its own specified lab with all the latest equipment and instruments. The library contains all kinds of the latest books, journals, latest publications, and research articles. The hostel facility is not available.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and experienced. Our college is affiliated with JNTUH, so all exams are conducted by them. It helps students in developing their skills. Our teachers support the students in participating in various activities, like attending conferences at other colleges, publishing articles, and writing research articles.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has good facilities and environment.

content.Placements: The college has more placements like in Dr Reddy's labs and pulses health tech. MSN labs and in various companies the roles offered by the course work in pharma companies like QC, QA, ARD, FRD and many such roles. We also have internships in various companies for M. pharmacy.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good lab equipment and a digital classroom with projectors. The college has a library with different kinds of books online and offline. The hostel rooms are clean and with healthy food. We have a hospital, a dental hospital, and a gynaecologist as a dermatologist.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is very nice. You can join.

content.Placements: We are going to start attending placements from 3-2 which means 6th semester. The companies offered by our college are Capgemini, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Tech Mahender, etc. To attend placement, you must have a minimum of 6 or above GPA, the 6 CGPA is the minimum for placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms are cool and spacious here. The library and labs are good. For sports lovers, there is a huge ground as well as an indoor stadium. Badminton courts, gym, table tennis are of high quality. The auditorium is also good here.

content.Placements: In my course, 20-30% of students get placed. The one-year package here ranges from Rs. 80,000-82,000. Many companies visit the college to recruit students. In this course, 75-80% of students get internships. The role offered by many companies is a lab technician in labs. After this course, we can also open our labs in any city, and there is an opportunity to start our own business.
content.Infrastructure: The college has big classrooms. All classrooms are airy, and in all classrooms, 4 fans and windows are available. There is a very useful library. Each lab is also available. In this college, no hostel is available. The quality of the food in the canteen is very good and fresh.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: They are not recommended at all, so stay far away from this college.

content.Placements: Above 50% can take admission. The offers ranged from Rs. 65,000 to 70,000, the minimum and maximum. Students could work in the Sun Pharmaceutical industry, laboratories, clinics, or in jobs at hospitals or the self-industry. 60% or above got internships in hospitals, laboratories, or the industry. The principal, of course, was involved.
content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi, but we had labs where we just passed the time, and classrooms were used for eating lunch. The library was a place where we chatted instead of studying. The food and canteen were not good. There was nothing like a proper canteen, it was just a small stall for us with no place to sit.

paragraphs: Lord Shiva College of Pharmacy admissions are entrance-based. The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 75,000 - 1,92,400. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average medical college for middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi is not available for students. Laboratories are well structured. Classrooms are not air-conditioned. There is a decent library in this college. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are available. A sports meet is organised every year.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied here. It has a good study and environment and good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. Facilities are pretty nice. There is no Wi-Fi, but there are labs for all subjects. Classrooms are well infrastructure. The library is well facilitated with all types of books. There is no hostel in our college. But there are facilities of PG.

reviews.review_heading: Good college just for study, not for other things like extracurricular activities, sports, placement
reviews.review_text: There's no hostel for boys, only for girls. Infrastructure is average. Not good playground for students. Labs are average, classrooms are average. Library after renovation is good now. Wi-Fi is only for the name. Food quality in mess is average, need lots of improvement there.

reviews.review_heading: Lord Shiva College of Pharmacy is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The college has big classrooms. All classrooms are airy, and in all classrooms, 4 fans and windows are available. There is a very useful library. Each lab is also available. In this college, no hostel is available. The quality of the food in the canteen is very good and fresh.

reviews.review_heading: They are not recommended at all, so stay far away from this college.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi, but we had labs where we just passed the time, and classrooms were used for eating lunch. The library was a place where we chatted instead of studying. The food and canteen were not good. There was nothing like a proper canteen, it was just a small stall for us with no place to sit.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for studies, but the building and campus are not good.
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities for students. All the labs are in good condition and all the experiments are performed by well-trained faculty in labs with safety. The classrooms and library are good. The hostel is available only for girls. The canteen is not good because there is no proper facility for seating, and there aren't many items in our canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for every student. There are good staff members for teaching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is the best for girls. It serves the best food for students. The canteen is of slightly less area, but the behavior of the canteen owner is the best. They handle the student in the best manner. The canteen serves the food and other things at less price as compared to the other canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are available here, and our college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available to students. Labs are nicely built and available to every student. Classrooms are clean and nice. The library has almost every book as per the syllabus. The quality of food served is good. Medical facilities are not much available. Sports and games are not concerned.

individual_reviews.title: More than just a degree - (covas parbhani) experience.

content.Placements: There is a batch of 85 students. The highest package is above 50 LPA. All private companies related to veterinary hire us. We have top government jobs, classes, and one officer like LDO (livestock department officer). We have much scope in this field, it's one of the best medical field types.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is full of greenery and trees, creating a peaceful environment. We have modern e-classrooms, and 3-floor library with all required books. We have separate hostel facilities with a garden, indoor sports rooms, and large playgrounds for cricket, volleyball, football, and more.

They have all the required instruments. All instruments are good. Our college provides a hostel facility for girls and boys.

college_info.intro:
Though Prestige Institute of Management & Research (PIMR Bhopal) offers a range of UG and PG courses across the Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, etc. streams its most popular courses are its MBA, MTech, and BTech courses being the institute's flagship. PIMR offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The PIMR Bhopal MBA programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Marketing, HR, Business Analytics, and others.
While the Prestige Institute of Management & Research BTech programme is offered for a duration of four-years programme and is highly sought-after with the programme imparting instruction in over 8 specialisations with each providing ample opportunities, hands-on training, and skill development to students. Students are also able to further pursue their education after BE/Tech with the PIMR Bhopal MTech programme
The campus infrastructure is designed to support the academic growth of students with specialised labs for the above programmes. Below-mentioned are a few other Prestige Institute of Management & Research Bhopal popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: About faculty members and placements of our college.

content.Placements: The first year of pharmacy is in our college, which is in Bhopal. But you will get a good placement from here, check the old records of the Indore campus. The educational system is average. In the past year, nobody has been selected because this is the first year of our college in Bhopal.
content.Infrastructure: Lab and classroom facilities are well but the teaching skills of teachers are average. Wi-Fi is available in the library for study. In our college, 3-5 libraries are available. Hostels are well-facilitated. We have good room, food, washrooms with water coolers, and clothes washing machines.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a decent engineering college.

content.Placements: Placements were decent. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Accenture, Wipro, and Infosys. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It was a private engineering college. The infrastructure was very good. All facilities were available. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Our campus had greenery all around. Hostels were well furnished. The food served in the mess was average. Classrooms were spacious.
content.Faculty: Teachers were average. The course curriculum was not updated. They did not provide practical knowledge to students. Teachers were very supportive. They also provided notes and materials during exams. Semester exams were easy.

admission_overview.description: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal, admission is entirely merit-based. Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal is a private institute located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The institute is affiliated with Rajiv Gandhi Technological University and Barkatullah University, Bhopal. Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal, offers UG and PG courses across Management, Pharmacy, Engineering, Education, and others. MBA, MTech, and BTech are the flagship courses offered to the students. The institute has partnered with IIT Ropar. PIMR offers a minor certificate and degree from IIT Ropar and MASAI. Interested students can apply online. Read the article to know more about PIMR Bhopal admission 2026.

admission_process.title: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The admission process forPrestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopalis merit based and starts with an online application process. Fill the application form available on the official PIMR website by providing the required data. Find below the step-wise explanation of the admission process for the college:
Application:Apply through the official PIMR website by filling the application form available online.

Release of Merit list: After the declaration of entrance exam/Board Exam results, the concerned authority conducts the centralised counselling for all candidates. The candidates will be called for counselling as per the rank of the candidates in the merit list.
Document Verification: The admission will be followed by the document verification, filling of the course and college choice, seat allotment and payment of counselling fee.

Allotment of Seats: The seats will be allotted according to the candidate’s rank, filled choices and availability of seats. Candidates will have to report to the allotted college for admission after the allotment of seats.

placement_data.title: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal has a Placement team that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. Students are put through a series of workshops, guest lectures, seminars and simulation exercises to become ready to meet the ever changing corporate challenges.

Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal has concluded the placements for the batch that passed out in 2024. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal placements 2024 stood at INR 11.40 LPA and INR 5.2 LPA, respectively. Further, the highest number of students placed in a single drive stood at 33. The top recruiters of Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal include Aditya Birla Group, Fullerton India, HDFC Bank, Parle, Reliance, Red FM 93.5, Kotak Mahindra, Dainik Bhaskar. Sundaram Mutual, Mahindra, Welspun , etc.

reviews.review_heading: About faculty members and placements of our college.
reviews.review_text: Lab and classroom facilities are well but the teaching skills of teachers are average. Wi-Fi is available in the library for study. In our college, 3-5 libraries are available. Hostels are well-facilitated. We have good room, food, washrooms with water coolers, and clothes washing machines.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent engineering college.
reviews.review_text: It was a private engineering college. The infrastructure was very good. All facilities were available. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Our campus had greenery all around. Hostels were well furnished. The food served in the mess was average. Classrooms were spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied of faculty, good placement in all years.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure for the all courses, there are best teachers which always guide you for your better future. They behave like your friends, and education system of this college is too good. Classes scheduled on 5 days in a week for 10am-4pm. And it has also best hostel, students easily and happily stay there.

reviews.review_heading: Average but Good college in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and Labs of our college is good, Wi-Fi is not available. Library is nice you can issue any book qny time. As I live before in the hostel, the hostel life is very bad. I've never know about medical facility. Every year games and sports events done by my college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: There are everything in our college but it's not updated in current situation. We need to smart classes. Class room is good. And canteen is average. Yes we are facing some issues in our college management. Yes Wi-Fi is available. And library also but old books are available in library. Sports are play.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institute, but not excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure developed in the college is average. There are many courses offered such as engineering, diploma, B.Ed, and D.Ed. Sports facilities are also available for students for our all-round development.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to learn engineering go to the Trinity campus.
reviews.review_text: The college undoubtedly looks like a White House all classrooms are provided with Asus projectors and Wi-Fi as well lets especially the mechanical lab and electronics and communication lab all are instrument and machines. Our lab session was regular the box office also available on the campus student can attended and anytime and any work for your minor and major project computer lab was also very good and upgraded.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college faculty and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a lot of facilities like Wi-Fi, LAN, digital library, and a playground. Some digital seminar halls are available to present seminars. A digital presentation hall is also available. The mechanical and electronics labs are good. A huge hall with an induction motor is available. All labs are very safe. Classrooms are peaceful as the college is far from the city. Food provided in the hostels is above average. Good facilities are provided. A canteen also is available. I have good...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the cheapest behaviour of the whole campus staff, chairman, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is good like aesthetic appearance is the blemish. The computer labs are big and more in number than the other colleges. In the library, we must continue to study in the peaceful atmosphere. There is a big playground for cricket, football, etc. The annual function is organised every year on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Pathetic college in terms of the placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. There is always construction going on in the college. The tech labs are also well-equipped, but they are not updated ones. The classrooms are spacious and proper seating arrangements are available. They have ground for playing cricket, volleyball, badminton and basketball in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college has satisfying faculty, good placements and really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available are well-maintained classrooms and labs, Wi-Fi facilities and all the books of national and international writers are also available. There are also medical facilities provided to the students. In college,  sports and games like cricket, badminton, volleyball, tennis, billiards, carrom are also available. The quality of labs and classrooms are neat, clean and well maintained. The food provided in our canteen is somehow better. The rooms are not available in the hostel, b...

reviews.review_heading: The truth about the college from my side of view.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all basic facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports centre, etc. The classrooms are not so good like there are no smart-class facilities, etc. Our college has separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the monthly charge is about 5k approximately.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied with the faculty and dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college is somehow better. There are all facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs. Almost all the books are available in our college of the national or international writer. Sports are also available in our college like badminton, chess, football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, etc. The medical facilities are also available. The quality of food available in the canteen is somehow better. The hostel facilities are not available in our...

Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal, offers financial assistance to the underprivileged through various scholarship programs. The institute offers merit scholarships available for all undergraduate courses like BTech, B.Ed., B.Sc., B.Com., B.B.A, B.Pharma and D.Pharma. PIMR offers a government scholarship that is also available for eligible candidates, which is given by the MP Government.

Trinity Institute of Technology and Research offers various scholarships to its BCom students, including fee waivers and financial assistance based on merit. TITR adheres to both Departmental Scholarship Policies and Central Scholarship Policies to support eligible students.

Trinity Institute of Technology and Research offers various scholarships to its BSc students, including fee waivers and financial assistance based on merit. TITR adheres to both Departmental Scholarship Policies and Central Scholarship Policies to support eligible students.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It was a good college for MBA especially, for distance learning program.

review_content.Placements: Our university provides a distance learning program. I did civil engineering from distance learning so I didn't get the campus placement. But those who do regular courses got placements as per their qualifications. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Roles provided were electrical engineer, IT engineer, process executive jobs, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and classrooms were available on campus. The hostel and canteen were good and food quality was also good enough. Medical facilities were available during emergencies. The infrastructure of the college was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of P.K. University.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 80% of students were placed. The lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Many students got jobs at Google, Microsoft, and many other companies. Around 75% of students got permanent jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good but the course was very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest you enjoy your college life with great fun and build a promising future.

faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
