overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: Where can I find the official PK University BBA fee details?
overview_faqs.answer: The official PK University BBA fee structure is available on the university's official website or can be confirmed through the concerned admission authorities. Since PK University BBA fees are subject to change, students should always verify the latest updates before applying.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: PK University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is overall good with good faculty and placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Minimum 8 CGPA students are placed. The highest packege of college is 8 Lacs per annum and the lowest 3 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are like adani ports. And minimum CGPA you got internship is 7.5 CGPA and roles offered in companies are like assistant web developed.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in college but they not focus on practical knowledge. And infrastructure are not so good because college are under construction. And college are fully Wi-Fi and library are also good classroom are also with good infrastructure. Hostel are good infrastructure and food also are good in canteen. College are provide medical facilities. And college many cultural activities and sport and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It was a good college for MBA especially, for distance learning program.

content.Placements: Our university provides a distance learning program. I did civil engineering from distance learning so I didn't get the campus placement. But those who do regular courses got placements as per their qualifications. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Roles provided were electrical engineer, IT engineer, process executive jobs, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and classrooms were available on campus. The hostel and canteen were good and food quality was also good enough. Medical facilities were available during emergencies. The infrastructure of the college was good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of P.K. University.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 80% of students were placed. The lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Many students got jobs at Google, Microsoft, and many other companies. Around 75% of students got permanent jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good but the course was very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you enjoy your college life with great fun and build a promising future.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placement after the 6th semester and can apply for various on and off-campus placements. Companies like Wipro, TCS and Accenture always visit our college to hire software developer freshers. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA by Wipro. The average salary package offered ranges from 2-5 LPA. Almost 100% of students got an internship at the college. Companies also provide many internships and pre-placement offers. My plan is to look for a software developer job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not very good, and the walls have not been painted for years. Classrooms are very spacy and well-organised with proper windows, whiteboards and a projector. The library has sorts of books you will need with some interesting novels. Currently, there is no hostel facility for students.

admission_overview.college_name: PK University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Admission at P.K. University are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inP.K. University, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include CBSE 10th, CBSE 12th, and MPBSE 10th, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. See below more insights on admissions forP.K. University courses:

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BCom at PK University?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the BCom programme at PK University, general category students must have scored at least 45% in Class 12. For SC/ST candidates, the minimum requirement is 40%. Students interested in PK University BCom admission must ensure they meet this basic eligibility before applying.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA at PK University?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the BBA programme at PK University, general category students must have scored at least 45% in Class 12. For SC/ST candidates, the minimum requirement is 40%. Students must meet these criteria before applying to PK University BBA admissions for the 2025 session.

college_info.college_name: Rajasthan Unani Medical College and Hospital: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfied by this college.

review_content.Placements: About 40 to 50% of students get government sector placements. The highest salary is 1.5 lakhs per month. Top placements are in SMS Hospital, and more excellent opportunities are provided. The top role provided is that of a Hakim, who makes Unani medicine. Internships are also provided by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college doesn't have a hostel but provides good equipment for sports. Medical facilities are excellent, and Wi-Fi facility is not provided by the college. Classrooms, etc., are very good and clean, and the infrastructure is nice but has to be improved much more.

reviews_list.batch_info: BUMS - Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: A good college, but if there is a hostel, this is the best one.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students are employed. The highest salary is 1 LPA and the lowest is Rs. 30,000 per month. SMS hospital is our the highest hospital, as I know some students are in SMS hospital and the rest are in their district hospital. The top role in this course is senior medical officer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not too much, but average. We have a physiology lab and anatomy lab, a decent classroom, and a good library. There is a negative point, our college doesn't have a hostel, but we think there must be a good hostel in the future. Overall, there are decent types of facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BUMS - Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is very friendly and has good teachers.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent of students are placed through our college. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. The top recruits are from SMS Hospital and District Hospital. Internships are also offered by these hospitals, and the top role in our field is Senior Medical Officer (SMO).
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are not very great, but it has Wi-Fi and a very good library. The college has a garden and a good playing area. Labs, like the physiology and anatomy labs, are decent. Medical facilities are excellent because of the medical college.
